title: selaginella brasiliensis var. crassinervia
intro: Selaginella brasiliensis var. crassinervia, also known as the Amazon shield fern, is a species of evergreen perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella brasiliensis var. crassinervia include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to act as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in herbal supplements to promote overall health and well-being.
